programmes.show_description: Spy thriller. Promising Oxford University students are disappearing. An M15 investigation uncovers a pattern of accidents and arrests. Is the KGB involved? Terence Stamp stars.
10/10. A trip to Kent inspires a nutty addition to Marcus's farm, and he harvests the bounty of the berry bushes. Last in series.
It's June, and the team heads up to Dartmoor to discover the ways in which Edwardian farmers took advantage of this unique and spectacular landscape to add to their income.
19/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Catherine Southon, Gary Barton and Micaela Sharp head to Lewes for a day.

35/35. Flo and Lee are in Hemel Hempstead to design a practical, usable family space for Lisa, Chris and their children. Last in series.
10/10. A trip to Kent inspires a nutty addition to Marcus's farm, and he harvests the bounty of the berry bushes. Last in series.
1/12. Robert's cattle are pregnant in the Cairngorms, the MacDonalds test out their potato harvester in North Uist, and Nikki and Ollie's cow goes into labour.
2/12. The Barclays find their feet with their new Fat Lamb business. Rachel and Camy head to Lairg to buy more ewes. Nikki and Ollie find out if their favourite buffalo is pregnant.
3/12. In North Uist, the Highland cattle are moved to a tidal island, and pregnancy is scanned. It's showtime for Camy and Rachel. Jenni expands her animal menagerie.
4/12. Fraser and Carianne head to the mainland to buy new tups. The Barclays prepare their sheep for the Lanark Winter Show, Nikki and Ollie try their hand at farming rabbits.
5/12. A deep freeze scuppers plans for the Barclays in South Ayrshire. Nikki and Ollie sell produce at a Christmas farmers' market. Robert gets to work on the new alpaca arena.
35/35. Flo and Lee are in Hemel Hempstead to design a practical, usable family space for Lisa, Chris and their children. Last in series.
Holland. Spring 1945. Two armies face each other in the final confrontation of World War II. The Allied forces and the remains of the Third Reich. Frederick Stafford stars.
British thriller. Julie sells sexual favours to male clients at her health farm then blackmails them. Starring Georgina Ward, written by Hazel Adair. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
Comedy. Sid South is a plumber with gambling debts. So he hatches a plan to nab a Picasso. Will the plan work or will his womanising get in the way? Contains sex scenes.
1/12. Robert's cattle are pregnant in the Cairngorms, the MacDonalds test out their potato harvester in North Uist, and Nikki and Ollie's cow goes into labour.
2/12. The Barclays find their feet with their new Fat Lamb business. Rachel and Camy head to Lairg to buy more ewes. Nikki and Ollie find out if their favourite buffalo is pregnant.
Following a painful adoption journey which comes to an abrupt halt, Hollyoaks star Ross Adams explores what can be done to make the system easier for LGBTQ+ adopters.

1/35. Charlie and Lee are in Chorlton to design a garden for Louise and Steve, inspired by their New Orleans wedding
Dave makes room in a house in St Leonards for a new modular staircase. Last in series. 20/20
1/8. How much will the collectors and dealers bid for a Banksy artwork, pickled pig foetuses and Tommy Cooper's fez?
2/2. A 1940s fairground attraction, Saddam Hussein's fork and a pinball machine signed by Elton John come to the auction house.
3/8. A bidding war breaks out over vintage Hermes bags. Also under the hammer: a print by street artist Invader and the coolest skateboard going, designed by the late Virgil Abloh.
4/8. Under the hammer this time: a slice of royal wedding cake, a skeleton straight out of the wardrobe, a rare London tube map, and some vintage Soho sex-shop neon.
Interviews with 19 men and women who were part of the Battle of Britain - unique accounts of the parts they played in the nation's defence, in their own words.
Action. Would-be journalist Sonya Winter investigates the Assassination Bureau, a mysterious organization. Ollie Reed and Diana Rigg star.
Simon Templar is on holiday in Naples when he intervenes between an arguing Englishman and Italian. So begins his investigation into mafia crime. Roger Moore stars.
A shy astrology columnist is ordered to spice up his column by having affairs with a woman from each star sign then writing about it. Contains sex scenes and 80s social attitudes.
